title: Juice & Visual Polish
summary: Score dropped by 1 and Juice has been stuck at 5/10 for two consecutive days. This is a fix/polish day focused entirely on making the game feel alive. Adding: animated signal flow through wires during simulation, gate activation glow effects, wire hover/active glow, improved celebration with screen flash, screen transition animations, and improved audio with varied pitch/character. Also fixing mobile gate/pin scaling for better touch targets.

tasks.description: Animated signal flow during simulation — signals pulse along wires as they propagate. Use animated gradient/dots moving along wire paths. Show values flowing from inputs through gates to outputs.
acceptance_criteria: During simulation, colored dots/pulses flow along wires
Pulse color matches signal state (green for 1, dim for 0)
Animation is smooth and clearly directional (input → output)
Works for each truth table row evaluation

tasks.description: Gate activation glow — gates glow when outputting 1 during simulation. Wire glow when carrying signal. Input/output nodes glow based on current value.
acceptance_criteria: Gates glow with colored border when output is 1
Input/output nodes pulse glow based on their value
Glow fades gracefully after simulation ends

tasks.description: Screen transition animations — fade/slide transitions between level select and gameplay screens
acceptance_criteria: Level select → gameplay has smooth transition (fade or slide)
Gameplay → level select has reverse transition
Transitions are fast (200-300ms) and don't block interaction

tasks.description: Victory screen flash and improved celebration — brief green flash on correct circuit, more dramatic confetti, star rating animation with bounce/scale
acceptance_criteria: Green screen flash on correct circuit
More confetti particles with varied shapes
Star display animates with bounce/scale effect
Result display has brief pulse animation

tasks.description: Scale gate rendering on mobile — make gates, pins, and wire thickness proportional to canvas size. Increase pin hit area for touch.
acceptance_criteria: Pin hit area increased to 24px on touch devices
Gate rendering scales appropriately on small canvases
Wire thickness adjusts for canvas scale

testing_focus: Signal flow animation visible during simulation
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
